---
title: "Katie Schabron"
name: "Katie Schabron"
image: "/images/profile_pics/katie_schabron.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Influence of campus architectire on bird-window collision dynamics (UW Bird-Window Collision Project)"
location: "**Research location:** Wyoming"
dates: "**Dates:** 2023-2024"
category: "Alumni"
category_order: "2"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
